MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW WESTLEY, TEL. NO. 362-2817 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF KEITH RUCKER'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF DEFENDANT RICHARD THOMAS TO COMPLAINT IS Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the third affirmative defense, the only issue raised by the demurrer. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)
